Name: Zoning, Dewitt Clinton Park North (801 Eleventh Avenue), Manhattan (C 260013 ZMM).
Title: Application number C 260013 ZMM (Dewitt Clinton Park North (801 Eleventh Avenue)) submitted by 801 11th Ave., LLC, pursuant to Sections 197-c and 201 of the New York City Charter for an amendment of the Zoning Map, Section Nos. 8a, 8b, and 8c, changing from an M2-4 District to a C4-7 District and establishing a Special Hudson River Park District (HRP), Borough of Manhattan, Community District 4, Council Districts 3 and 6.

History.Description: This Land Use Application was Introduced by Council
